categories.label: Uncovered Spaces (Penalty)
categories.description: Negative points for each uncovered space on home and exploration boards

categories.label: Exploration Board Bonuses
categories.description: Bonus points from claimed exploration boards (islands, sheds, houses)

categories.label: Emigration Bonuses
categories.description: Points earned from emigration actions during the game

categories.label: English Crowns
categories.description: Bonus points from English crown achievements

categories.label: Occupation Card Bonuses
categories.description: End-game scoring from occupation card effects

categories.label: Starvation Penalty
categories.description: -3 points per unfed Viking across all rounds
